validation_checks.name: validate_only_mode_exits_clean
validation_checks.description: Script exits 0 in --validate-only mode when inputs are present
validation_checks.detail: Exit 0. Inputs validated: 19 clusters, 10 CEUs grounded=9, PASS.

validation_checks.name: dry_run_produces_correct_domain_count
validation_checks.description: Dry-run computes 9 domains from 19 clusters, 123 nodes assigned
validation_checks.detail: 9 domains, 123/123 nodes assigned, validation_status=PASS. No files written.

validation_checks.name: write_mode_creates_dom_layer_json
validation_checks.description: Write mode creates dom/dom_layer.json at expected path

validation_checks.name: dom_layer_json_is_valid_json
validation_checks.description: Output file parses as valid JSON

validation_checks.name: domain_count_correct
validation_checks.detail: domain_count=9. Domains: APPLICATION, CI_INFRA, CONFIGURATION, DEPENDENCY, DOCUMENTATION, GENERATED, INFRA, TESTING, TOOLING

validation_checks.name: total_nodes_assigned
validation_checks.description: All 123 nodes from canonical_topology assigned — no ROOT domain

validation_checks.name: dual_format_output_present
validation_checks.description: dom_layer.json contains both domains array and dom_groups array
validation_checks.detail: Both arrays present with same 9 domains, 123 nodes. dom_groups uses Phase 5 field names (dom_id, dom_label, included_nodes, derivation_rule, path_patterns).

validation_checks.name: create_only_guard
validation_checks.description: Re-run in write mode exits 1 (FAIL-CLOSED) when dom_layer.json already exists
validation_checks.detail: Exit 1. Message: CREATE_ONLY violation — dom_layer.json already exists.

validation_checks.name: manifest_updated_with_dom_layer_path
validation_checks.description: source_manifest.json contains dom_layer_path field with correct value

validation_checks.name: manifest_idempotent_rerun
validation_checks.description: Re-run does not overwrite existing dom_layer_path if already set to correct value
validation_checks.detail: Exit 0. Log: dom_layer_path already set to correct value (skipped).

validation_checks.name: no_semantic_inference
validation_checks.description: Domain assignment uses only cluster name pattern matching — no content analysis
validation_checks.detail: All 10 DOMAIN_RULES are syntactic predicates (startswith, endswith, set membership). No file reads of source content.

validation_checks.name: domain_id_assignment_deterministic
validation_checks.description: DOM-NN IDs assigned by alphabetical sort of domain names
validation_checks.detail: DOM-01=APPLICATION, DOM-02=CI_INFRA, DOM-03=CONFIGURATION, DOM-04=DEPENDENCY, DOM-05=DOCUMENTATION, DOM-06=GENERATED, DOM-07=INFRA, DOM-08=TESTING, DOM-09=TOOLING. Alphabetical order confirmed.
